markdownRemark.html:
Awesome browser extensions for GitHub

All numbers are updated daily and include the overall usage of an extension across all browsers, the last publish date and stars of the GitHub repository! Contributions are welcome but first see Contributing



Visit the awesome browser extensions for GitHub web version with additional filter options.


Supporters

Thanks for those who are supporting my work via GitHub Sponsors.

Your logo here?



Advanced GitHub Notifierstars53

Shows notifications when you get a new notification on GitHub and provides quick access to all notifications in a popup.

Installs: 208 | Stars: 51 | Last update: 21 Jan 2021

Autoviewedstars3

Removes clutter from your pull request by automatically marking as viewed files that aren't worth reviewing.

Installs: 14 | Stars: 3 | Last update: 7 Jul 2020

CodeWingstars21

Next level code navigation for GitHub.

Installs: 119 | Stars: 17 | Last update: 25 Mar 2021

Codeflowerstars7

Visualize GitHub repos as d3 force-directed graphs. The extension gives you a quick overview of the size and composition of any repo.

Installs: 154 | Stars: 7 | Last update: 18 Mar 2021

CoderStats link for GitHubstars13

The CoderStats link for GitHub Chrome extension displays a link to the CoderStats page for the currently displayed user or organization profile page on GitHub.

Installs: 630 | Stars: 13 | Last update: 20 Nov 2020

Enhanced GitHubstars1.2k

Displays size of each file, download link and an option of copying file contents directly to clipboard

Installs: 40243 | Stars: 1164 | Last update: 23 Mar 2021

GIFs for GitHubstars55

Easily search GIPHY to add a GIF into any GitHub comment box.

Installs: 2231 | Stars: 49 | Last update: 15 Nov 2020

Gifhub Pull Requeststars17

Find the best GIFs for your awesome pull requests.

Installs: 180 | Stars: 16 | Last update: 4 Aug 2019

Git Historystars12.5k

Quickly browse the history of a file from any git repository.

Installs: 7253 | Stars: 12473 | Last update: 6 May 2020

GitHub Awesome Autocompletestars1k

Simple and discreet extension that enhances GitHub's search, letting you search for repositories and people faster than ever.

Installs: 10000 | Stars: 1019 | Last update: 22 Feb 2018

GitHub CSV Diffstars0

GitHub provides a page that only shows diffs with a .diff at the end of the URL of the pull request. This browser extension makes it easier to view csv diffs by using daff on that page.

Installs: n/a | Stars: n/a | Last update: n/a

GitHub Code Foldingstars231

Code folding - the ability to selectively hide and display sections of a code - is an invaluable feature in many text editors and IDEs. Now, developers can utilize that same style code-folding while poring over source code on the web in GitHub. Works for any type of indentation- spaces or tabs.

Installs: 2173 | Stars: 227 | Last update: 10 Apr 2019

GitHub Custom Tab Sizestars60

Set custom tab size for code view on GitHub.com

Installs: 727 | Stars: 59 | Last update: 6 May 2019

GitHub Diff Navigatorstars13

Easily navigate through the changes in a file that has been edited on GitHub.

Installs: 202 | Stars: 13 | Last update: 7 Sep 2018

GitHub File Iconstars925

A browser extension which gives different filetypes different icons on GitHub.

Installs: 10717 | Stars: 910 | Last update: 9 Oct 2020

GitHub Highlight Selectedstars134

Highlight selected word in GitHub source view like Sublime Text.

Installs: 1000 | Stars: 133 | Last update: 8 Oct 2019

GitHub Hovercardstars1.6k

Neat hovercards for GitHub.

Installs: 21291 | Stars: 1573 | Last update: 14 Jan 2021

GitHub Issue Link Statusstars259

Colorize issue and PR links to see their status (open, closed, merged).

Installs: 1096 | Stars: 248 | Last update: 18 Mar 2021

GitHub Npm Statsstars47

Displays npm package stats on GitHub

Installs: 545 | Stars: 46 | Last update: 31 May 2020

GitHub Repo Sizestars882

Automatically adds repository size to GitHub's repository summary.

Installs: 10000 | Stars: 866 | Last update: 26 Jun 2020

GitHub Story Pointsstars43

Chrome extension to see story points in GitHub projects.

Installs: 653 | Stars: 43 | Last update: 17 Aug 2020

GitHub User Languagesstars36

Generates a pie chart on user profile pages displaying a breakdown of what languages they have used in their repositories.

Installs: 494 | Stars: 36 | Last update: 19 Jul 2019

GitHub Writerstars227

This extension adds the simplicity of WYSIWYG editing to issues, comments, pull requests, wikis and discussions in GitHub. It accepts Markdown input and offers productive writing, starting with tables.

Installs: 1103 | Stars: 221 | Last update: 27 Jan 2021

GitHub vscode-iconsstars134

Show vscode-iconsstars2.9k in the repository browser.

Installs: 1236 | Stars: 119 | Last update: 25 Mar 2021

Github Saved Filters

Create, save, edit, pin, search and delete filters that you commonly use on the Github Issues and Pull Requests pages. You are able to scope filters to be shown globally (on each repo) or only have them show up on the repo you create them on. Pinning filters is also a feature that this extension allows you to do. So if you have several filters you use daily - you have a way to quickly access them, at the top of your list.

Installs: 84 | Stars: n/a | Last update: 27 Jan 2021

GithubOriginalStreakstars201

Extension to get back current and longest streak.

Installs: 747 | Stars: 200 | Last update: 4 Mar 2021

Hacker Tabstars296

Replace browser new tab screen with GitHub trending projects.

Installs: 3000 | Stars: 292 | Last update: 21 Jun 2020

Hide files on GitHubstars282

Hide dotfiles from the GitHub file browser.

Installs: 621 | Stars: 277 | Last update: 19 Nov 2020

Isometric Contributionsstars2.9k

Allows you to toggle between the normal GitHub contribution chart and an isometric pixel art version.

Installs: 10000 | Stars: 2886 | Last update: 30 Mar 2021

Like On GitHubstars219

Chrome extension that adds a button in browser and links this button to a GitHub repository that you will configure, then on any webpage just click this extension button and it will add the given link with the title of the page in that repository.

Installs: 77 | Stars: 218 | Last update: 26 May 2018

Lovely forksstars375

See forks with the most stars under the names of repositories.

Installs: 1241 | Stars: 368 | Last update: 26 Dec 2020

Module Linkerstars230

An extension that creates direct links to imported modules, external or internal, on source code on GitHub. Supports multiple languages, including common ones like Rust, Go, Python and Ruby, but also odd ones like Nim, Haskell, Julia and Elm.

Installs: 102 | Stars: 229 | Last update: 27 Nov 2019

My Git Repo Newsstars11

Chrome extension which helps you not to miss important changes in your news thread related to your repo

Installs: 18 | Stars: 11 | Last update: 1 Oct 2018

Notifications Preview for GitHubstars107

A Chrome and Firefox extension to quickly see your notifications in a popup without leaving the current page.

Installs: 344 | Stars: 106 | Last update: 9 Mar 2021

Notifier for GitHubstars1.3k

Displays your GitHub notifications unread count. Supports GitHub Enterprise and an option to only show unread count for issues you're participating in. You can click the icon to quickly see your unread notifications.

Installs: 10387 | Stars: 1261 | Last update: 19 Nov 2020

OctoHintstars912

Octohint adds IntelliSense hint feature to GitHub.

Installs: 6000 | Stars: 905 | Last update: 25 Dec 2018

OctoLensesstars88

Filter your pull requests/issues in different categories giving you a big boost in productivity. Also suggests new trending repositories.

Installs: 67 | Stars: 83 | Last update: 5 Mar 2020

OctoLinkerstars4.7k

OctoLinker is the easiest and best way to navigate between files and projects on GitHub. It supports languages such as JavaScript, Ruby, Go, PHP, JAVA and more. It works with package.json as well as with Gemfiles.

Installs: 30334 | Stars: 4667 | Last update: 2 Jan 2021

OctoPermalinkerstars14

OctoPermalinker is a browser extension that searches GitHub comments/files for links to files on branches, and adds a link to where the branch pointed when the comment/file was made/updated. This helps you avoid following a link that was broken after being posted. For context, here's some discussion about broken GitHub links: Don't link to line numbers in GitHub.

For example, suppose you're looking at a gist that links to a file on the master branch of a repo. At the time the gist was made, the link worked, but if the file gets removed, the link is broken. OctoPermalinker uses the gist creation date to add a permalink that still works.

Installs: 111 | Stars: 14 | Last update: 20 May 2017

Octotreestars21.3k

Useful for developers who frequently read source in GitHub and do not want to download or checkout too many repositories.

Installs: 332968 | Stars: 21154 | Last update: 30 Mar 2021

Old School GitHubstars198

Revert GitHub's UI back to its classic look (before the June 23, 2020 update that has a flat, rounded and more whitespaced design).

Installs: n/a | Stars: n/a | Last update: n/a

Open GitHub file links in IDEstars16

This browser extension allows you to open files in your IDE directly from GitHub, assuming the repository you are working on is cloned on your computer. When a fragment of a file is displayed, your IDE opens the file and puts the cursor at the desired line.

Installs: 228 | Stars: 13 | Last update: 20 Mar 2021

PR Monitorstars47

Helps you keep track of incoming and outgoing PRs, and notifies you when you receive a pull request on GitHub.

Installs: 521 | Stars: 46 | Last update: 5 Jun 2020

Potential changes for GitHubstars93

Browser extension that shows which pull requests contain changes related to a file.

Installs: 51 | Stars: 92 | Last update: 15 Oct 2020

Refined GitHubstars14.4k

Extension that simplifies the GitHub interface and adds useful features.

Installs: 45410 | Stars: 14093 | Last update: 26 Mar 2021

Render Whitespace on GitHubstars65

Are they tabs? Are they spaces? How many? Never wonder again! Renders spaces as · and tabs as → in all the code on GitHub.

Installs: 671 | Stars: 64 | Last update: 25 Aug 2018

Semantic Code Reviews

Introduces the Explore tab in the pull request interface where you can review changes ordered by importance and see the semantic context surrounding each change.

Installs: 61 | Stars: n/a | Last update: 10 Aug 2020

Sourcegraph

The Sourcegraph browser extension gives GitHub IDE-like powers when you're viewing code, pull requests, and diffs:

  1. Go to definition
  2. Find references
  3. Powerful code search with regexp matching, diff searches, and other filters
  4. Hover tooltips
  5. File tree navigation

Installs: 100000 | Stars: 4548 | Last update: 30 Mar 2021

Tab Size on GitHubstars274

Make tab indented code more readable by forcing the tab size to 4 instead of 8.

Installs: 2000 | Stars: 271 | Last update: 31 Jan 2021

What's New on GitHubstars19

Helps you see easily which activities happened since you last visited GitHub.

Installs: 61 | Stars: 19 | Last update: 18 May 2020

ZenHub

ZenHub is the first and only project management suite that works natively within GitHub; enhancing your workflow with features built specifically for startups, fast-moving engineering teams, and the open-source community. The product is a browser extension that injects advanced functionality including real-time drag-and-drop Issue Task Boards, peer feedback via a +1 button, and support for uploading any file type directly into the GitHub interface. ZenHub makes it easy to centralize all processes into GitHub, keeping your team lean and agile.

Installs: 70000 | Stars: n/a | Last update: 29 Mar 2021

github.expandinizrstars123

Add breakpoints at 1400px, 1600px and 1800px for full GitHub experience on large screens. Also removes the truncating of file and directory names in the repository browser.

Installs: 2000 | Stars: 122 | Last update: 24 Jul 2020

npmhubstars552

When viewing a repository on github.com that has a package.json file, this extension will introspect the dependencies in package.json and display links and description for each dependency, just below the repo's README.

Installs: 2145 | Stars: 545 | Last update: 31 Jan 2021
